text: "A volume."... That is, a parchment, according to the form of the ancient books, which, from being rolled up, were called volumes.
"This is their eye."... This is what they fix their eye upon: or this is a resemblance and figure of them, that is of sinners.

"Babel"... or Babylon was built, (Gen. 11), where note, that Babylon in holy writ is often taken for the city of the devil: that is, for the whole congregation of the wicked: as Jerusalem is taken for the city and people of God.
